title: Variant Axolotls!
description: How about we colorize your hotbar with some axolotls?
body:
This resource packs adds all the variants of axolotls into your hotbar by adding a new texture depending on the axolotl's color you have in the bucket. 

Example: if you have a yellow axolotl in a bucket, the axolotl shown inside the bucket will be yellow.
